AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Class FabricationMaterialUtils

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.Utils
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Utilities for working with fabrication materials via Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationConfiguration.

public static class FabricationMaterialUtils
Inheritance
object
FabricationMaterialUtils
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

These helpers enumerate fabrication materials, group them, and build lookup dictionaries that optionally match a provided list of material names using a "cleaned" comparison (text before '{').

Methods

CleanMaterialName(string)

Normalizes a fabrication material name by removing any trailing metadata starting at the first '{'.

public static string CleanMaterialName(string name)

Parameters

name string

Raw material name.

Returns

string

The cleaned material name, or the original name if it is null/empty/whitespace.

Remarks

Some fabrication material names include suffix metadata in braces (e.g., "Steel {something}"). This helper returns "Steel" for matching purposes.

GetAllFabricationMaterialGroups(Document)

Gets the material group for every fabrication material defined in the current fabrication configuration.

public static List<string> GetAllFabricationMaterialGroups(this Document doc)

Parameters

doc Document

The active Revit document.

Returns

List<string>

A list of group names corresponding to all fabrication materials.

Remarks

The returned list may include duplicates; use Distinct() if you need unique group names.

Exceptions

NullReferenceException

May occur if the document has no fabrication configuration (Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationConfiguration.GetFabricationConfiguration(Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document) returns null).

GetAllFabricationMaterialNames(Document)

Gets the names of all fabrication materials defined in the current fabrication configuration.

public static List<string> GetAllFabricationMaterialNames(this Document doc)

Parameters

doc Document

The active Revit document.

Returns

List<string>

A list of fabrication material names as returned by Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationConfiguration.GetMaterialName(System.Int32).

Exceptions

NullReferenceException

May occur if the document has no fabrication configuration (Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationConfiguration.GetFabricationConfiguration(Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document) returns null).

GetFabricationMaterialDictionary(Document, string[])

Builds a dictionary mapping fabrication material ids to their display names, optionally constrained to a set of input names.

public static Dictionary<int, string> GetFabricationMaterialDictionary(this Document doc, string[] materialNames = null)

Parameters

doc Document

The active Revit document.

materialNames string[]

Optional list of material names to match. Matching is performed on the cleaned form of each name (see CleanMaterialName(string)), using case-insensitive comparison.

Returns

Dictionary<int, string>

If materialNames is null/empty: a dictionary of all materials (id → name).

If provided: a dictionary of matched materials (id → name).

Remarks

This method first builds a case-insensitive lookup keyed by cleaned material name. If multiple materials share the same cleaned name, the first encountered material id/name is used.

If one or more requested names cannot be matched, a warning is displayed via CustomMessageBox.

Exceptions

NullReferenceException

May occur if the document has no fabrication configuration (Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationConfiguration.GetFabricationConfiguration(Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document) returns null).

GetFabricationMaterialNamesByGroup(Document, string)

Gets fabrication material names that belong to a specific material group.

public static List<string> GetFabricationMaterialNamesByGroup(this Document doc, string materialGroup)

Parameters

doc Document

The active Revit document.

materialGroup string

The exact material group name to match.

Returns

List<string>

A list of fabrication material names in the specified group.

Remarks

Group comparison is case-sensitive because it uses == on strings. If you want case-insensitive matching, compare using Equals(string, string, StringComparison).

Exceptions

NullReferenceException

May occur if the document has no fabrication configuration (Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationConfiguration.GetFabricationConfiguration(Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document) returns null).
